html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Midsummer Cawnival

The Seed Clusters can be crafted from the Prize Booth at a cost of 12 Prize Tickets. Opening them will give 4 Corn Seeds.
plainText:

Only during the Event: Midsummer Cawnival
Seed Clusters
"A crunchy Cawnival favorite."
Mob Info
Drops
x4
Object Info
Does not stack
Crafting

Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnival_seedpacket"
“I was feeling a bit peckish.”
–Wilson
“Ugh, bird food.”
–Willow
“Bird snack.”
–Wolfgang
“It tastes like disappointment.”
–Wendy
“MEAGER SUSTENANCE”
–WX-78
“A bit of extra fiber added to one's diet never hurts.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hmph. Bird food.”
–Woodie
“About as pleasant as you'd expect.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis föod för birds, nöt Vikings.”
–Wigfrid
“We should've gotten the popcorn instead...”
–Webber
“They could use a bit of seasoning.”
–Warly
“Thanks Tweeters!”
–Wormwood
“Looks like a bag of bird food.”
–Winona
“I'm sure they won't be offended if I dump these on the ground.”
–Wortox
“Mmmm, crunchy snack.”
–Wurt
“I guess it's sort of like trail mix. Sort of.”
–Walter
“A little snack to keep in my pocket.”
–Wanda
The Seed Clusters can be crafted from the Prize Booth at a cost of 12 Prize Tickets. Opening them will give 4 Corn Seeds.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Các Cụm Hạt giống có thể được chế tạo từ Quầy Giải thưởng với chi phí là 12 Vé Giải thưởng. Mở chúng sẽ cho 4 Hạt ngô.
title: Seed Clusters
